strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Proven track record in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., real-time data processing at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated ability to build scalable systems and tools (e.g., MCP code generators, AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited direct experience with fintech-specific systems (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or embedded finance)
No explicit mention of regulated environment experience or compliance infrastructure design
Lack of clear leadership experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–30 people or developing senior technical-leadership layers
response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed-systems and real-time data processing experience, which aligns with key technical requirements for agentic AI and event-driven architectures. However, his resume lacks explicit fintech domain expertise (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance) and evidence of leading large-scale engineering organizations, which are critical for this role. His contributions to AI-agent tooling and infrastructure are promising but not yet demonstrated in a fintech context.
